description.value: Price 11,700 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura faint enchantment DESCRIPTION This +1 merciful pistol is ornamented with filigree of angelic creatures along the barrel, and houses intricate brass gears. Whenever the wielder scores a critical hit while using this weapon to deal nonlethal damage, the target must succeed at a DC 12 Will saving throw or be dazed for 1 round. As a swift action, a wielder with the grit class feature can spend 1 grit point to increase the DC of this save by 4. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,500 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cure light wounds, daze monster
